ddls:
CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment type (e.g., women's, men's, kids) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the garment type (e.g., women's tops, men's bottoms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_systems" (
  "size_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size system */,
  "size_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the size system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size system */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the size system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Inch, Cm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_sizes" (
  "garment_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment size */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size system */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the garment size (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_sizes_size_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_system_id") REFERENCES size_systems ("size_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_sizes_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "garment_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment size */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement of the garment */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the garment */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the garment */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement of the garment */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the garment */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES size_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_measurements_garment_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_size_id") REFERENCES garment_sizes ("garment_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment style */,
  "garment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "style_category" TEXT /* Category of the garment style (e.g., streetwear, luxury) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_styles_garment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_type_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment version */,
  "garment_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment size */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the garment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garment_versions_garment_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_size_id") REFERENCES garment_sizes ("garment_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, production manager, quality control) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., design, production, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "garment_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment size being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., updated measurement, added new style) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_garment_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_size_id") REFERENCES garment_sizes ("garment_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)
